name: What lurks in the night
description:
Somethings are better left in the dark...

Most things people call “supernatural” have tidy explanations—odd weather, a sick animal, a shadow your brain misread. Reason can explain almost anything... almost. But if you linger in the dark long enough, you’ll realize something else is out there. Something reason refuses to touch.

This is a series of eerie scenarios where you will encounter things you can't comprehend. Do your best to survive because I can guarantee you, you're not alone.

Alright, let me break the horror narrator a little bit here, I'm watching a lot of "real" horror videos on YouTube, specially from Wartime Stories, so I wanted to try my hand at making my own scenarios. I hope I can get at least a little chill out of you.

There's no extra pics for this one, this is not a smut bot (tough a smut version can be done). Anyway, here's the usual links
